name: grok-bitch
description: Self-hosted marketplace for the grok-bitch plugin — hand grunt work to a caged grok from Claude Code.

plugins.name: grok-bitch
plugins.description: Offload mechanical, well-specified, verifiable grunt work to a caged grok (grok-build) and get back a structured JSON verdict. OS sandbox + resource caps (no OOM) + guard/revert on protected paths + verify gate. Includes an auto-discovered skill, a Rick subagent (it bosses grok/Morty around in an isolated context), and the grok-bitch CLI on PATH.
